---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea or enhancement for Visus"
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem or friction?
A clear and concise description of what the challenge or friction is (e.g. "I find it hard to focus on the ORP when reading over 600 words per minute...").

## Proposed Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want the platform to do (e.g. new segmentation algorithm, cloud sync integrations, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or flows you evaluated before making this request.

## Multi-Device Impact
How does this feature improve the experience on both mobile (speed-reading on the go) and desktop (deep study environments)?

## Mockups or Visual References (optional)
Insert sketches, mockups, diagrams, or links to similar interfaces.
